positive: A highly stylized, abstract celestial fox silhouette sitting gracefully atop a minimalist crescent moon. The fox should have flowing, ethereal tails, and the composition should utilize deep indigo and sapphire blues contrasting sharply with glowing gold and luminous teal accents. Background elements include scattered, stylized constellations and cosmic dust rendered as delicate, geometric patterns. The style must be reminiscent of neo-oriental folklore meets modern minimalist tattoo art. Use strong outlines, clean lines, high contrast, and perfect symmetry for a central, striking apparel graphic. Studio lighting, perfect composition, vector art quality, highly detailed, symmetrical, centered design.
negative: photorealistic, photo, messy, blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, signature, grainy, low detail, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, abstract background mess
